title: Commitment Output Scripts
description: Lightning commitment transactions pay balances through distinct to_local and to_remote output scripts. The to_local branch uses a revocable CSV-delayed script, while the to_remote branch captures the immediately spendable counterparty output, including the modern static_remotekey pattern.

resources.title: Programming Lightning: Commitment Scripts
resources.notes: Interactive lesson covering to_local, to_remote, static_remotekey, and why CSV protects the delayed local branch.

resources.title: BOLT 03: Bitcoin Transaction and Script Formats
resources.notes: Canonical specification for to_local, to_remote, and related commitment output script templates.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Best long-form treatment of commitment output design, static_remotekey, and the operational safety model behind CSV-delayed spends.
